title: Legion Review Finding
description: Schema for a single review finding in REVIEW.md
$comment: Completion Gate: a finding is complete when (1) it validates against this schema (all required fields present, enums match, id matches pattern ^F-\d{3,}$); (2) status is one of open|fixed|accepted|deferred (no null, no missing); (3) if status=fixed, a cycle number is recorded; (4) if severity is blocker or critical, suggested_fix is non-empty. Validators MUST fail closed — unknown severity or status values are REJECTED, not coerced.
